'''鈭歾h-ch-l-p''' ('''kazhachlepoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:dance|dance]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-ch-l-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dance|dance]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾h-ch-l-p
|-
! Lemma
| kazhachlepoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizhachlepoko|thizhachlepoko]] || [[word:jizhachlepoko|jizhachlepoko]] || [[word:shizhachlepoko|shizhachlepoko]] || [[word:kizhachlepoko|kizhachlepoko]]

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
